title: Regularized logistic stacker on logits
summary: Use logits of RealMLP core and CatBoost probabilities in a two-feature logistic stacker.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Clip probabilities, transform p_realmlp_core and p_catboost to logits, and train a strongly regularized LogisticRegression stacker on true OOF rows. Apply the same transform to test predictions.
expected_effect: Let the stacker combine confidence on a more linear scale than raw probabilities.
risk: Logit transform can amplify calibration issues near 0 or 1.
